heading: Penalty with respect to certain adulterated fuels
label: 6720A Penalty with respect to certain adulterated fuels
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 109–59, title XI, § 11167(d)119 Stat. 1978Aug. 10, 2005“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section and amending ] shall apply to any transfer, sale, or holding out for sale or resale occurring after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”section 9503 of this titleAug. 10, 2005
amendments: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 109–59, title XI, § 11167(d)119 Stat. 1978Aug. 10, 2005“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section and amending ] shall apply to any transfer, sale, or holding out for sale or resale occurring after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”section 9503 of this titleAug. 10, 2005

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Any person who knowingly transfers for resale, sells for resale, or holds out for resale any liquid for use in a diesel-powered highway vehicle or a diesel-powered train which does not meet applicable EPA regulations (as defined in section 45H(c)(3)), shall pay a penalty of $10,000 for each such transfer, sale, or holding out for resale, in addition to the tax on such liquid (if any).

children.heading: Penalty in the case of retailers
children.label: b Penalty in the case of retailers
children.text: Any person who knowingly holds out for sale (other than for resale) any liquid described in subsection (a), shall pay a penalty of $10,000 for each such holding out for sale, in addition to the tax on such liquid (if any).
